channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
item.description: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits

item.title: Perseverance checks in from Mars with a selfie, the mounting pollution from satellite launches, and more science stories
Six mois avec un robot qui aspire, purifie l’air, surveille la maison et porte les smartphones
item.description: J'ai utilisé l'aspirateur robbot SwitchBot K20+ Pro pendant six mois en utilisant une panoplie d'accessoires pour le transformer en purificateur d'air, en caméra de sécurité et en base nomade pour les smartphones.

item.title: Sony tries to explain that its AI Camera Assistant doesn’t suck
item.description: After Sony drew some unwanted attention for a post demonstrating its AI Camera Assistant on the Xperia 1 XIII, it's trying to clarify how the feature works. The company says it doesn't edit photos, but makes suggestions based on lighting, depth, and subject. Point the camera at something, and it will give you four options […]

item.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman reportedly takes charge of product strategy
item.description: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

item.title: NASA's Psyche spacecraft just got an assist from Mars on the way to its asteroid namesake
item.description: Its target asteroid could give us insight on how Earth's core came to be.

item.title: Ce chargeur de 100 W au look amusant perd 35 % de son prix sur Amazon
item.description: Avec ce chargeur de 100 W, Ugreen propose un appareil au design amusant capable de charger jusqu'à quatre appareils simultanément. Chez Amazon, il perd presque 35 % sur son prix.

item.title: ‘We perform tests that would destroy standard office furniture’: AndaSeat tells us how its gaming chair design expertise is creating a 'superior' home office experience
item.description: I spoke to Lin Zhou, AndaSeat CEO, about the company's shift into the home office space.

item.title: Huawei en France en 2026 : faut-il vraiment franchir le pas ?
item.description: En 2026, s'offrir un Huawei haut de gamme en France, c'est accepter de conduire une Ferrari sur un circuit dont la moitié des stands refusent de vous ravitailler. La mécanique est prodigieuse. La course, elle, reste semée d'embûches.

item.title: NPR’s Manoush Zomorodi talks about living with too much tech
item.description: Manoush Zamorodi is an accomplished reporter, podcast host, and author. Her new book, Body Electric, takes a comprehensive look at how technology is impacting our physical health. It's a collaboration between NPR and Columbia University Medical Center that picks up where her first title, Bored and Brilliant, left off. That book looked at how technology […]...

item.title: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
item.description: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

item.title: La Terre est-elle encore plus rare qu’on le pensait ? Une étude ajoute un critère décisif
item.description: Toutes les planètes situées dans une « zone habitable » ne sont pas forcément capables d’abriter la vie. Une nouvelle étude suggère qu’en dessous d’une certaine taille, les mondes rocheux perdraient trop rapidement leur atmosphère et leurs océans pour rester habitables sur le long terme. Une...
